cases.prompt: What does the Unique Entity Title module do?
expected_points: Enforces uniqueness of node titles and taxonomy term names within a bundle

cases.prompt: Where is the central settings form for Unique Entity Title?
expected_points: There is no central settings form and no configure route
Configuration is a per-bundle checkbox on the content type / vocabulary edit form
Stored as a third_party_settings flag (enabled) under the unique_entity_title namespace

cases.prompt: How do I require unique titles for the Article content type without using the UI?
Which entity types does Unique Entity Title support?
expected_points: Only node (title field) and taxonomy_term (name field)
No support for other entity types

cases.prompt: When editing and re-saving an existing node with unique titles enabled, will it flag itself as a duplicate?
expected_points: The uniqueness query excludes the current entity by id
Values are trimmed and empty values are skipped

cases.prompt: Does Unique Entity Title add any Drush commands or permissions?
expected_points: Configuration is only the per-bundle third-party setting
